  2→

 10→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.CREATE_SITE
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.FAILURE
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.IDLE
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.SUCCESS
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.CreateSiteUseCase
 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 20→import javax.inject.Inject
 21→import javax.inject.Named
 22→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 23→import kotlin.properties.Delegates
 24→
 25→class SiteCreationServiceManager @Inject constructor(
 26→    private val createSiteUseCase: CreateSiteUseCase,
 27→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 28→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 29→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 30→) : CoroutineScope {
 31→    private val job = Job()
 32→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 33→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 34→
 35→    private lateinit var siteData: SiteCreationServiceData
 36→    private lateinit var languageId: String
 37→    private lateinit var timeZoneId: String
 38→    private lateinit var serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 39→    private var isRetry by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 40→    private var newSiteRemoteId by Delegates.notNull<Long>()
 41→    private var newSiteUrl by Delegates.notNull<String>()
 42→
 43→    fun onStart(
 44→        languageWordPressId: String,
 45→        timeZoneId: String,
 46→        previousState: String?,
 47→        data: SiteCreationServiceData,
 48→        serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 49→    ) {
 50→        languageId = languageWordPressId
 51→        this.timeZoneId = timeZoneId
 52→        siteData = data
 53→        this.serviceListener = serviceListener
 54→
 55→        executePhase(IDLE)
 56→
 57→        isRetry = previousState != null
 58→
 59→        val phaseToExecute = if (isRetry) {
 60→            SiteCreationStep.valueOf(previousState!!)
 61→        } else {
 62→            CREATE_SITE
 63→        }
 64→
 65→        if (SiteCreationServiceState(phaseToExecute).isTerminal) {
 66→            AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, "IllegalState: SiteCreationService can't resume a terminal step!")
 67→        } else {
 68→            executePhase(phaseToExecute)
 69→        }
 70→    }
 71→
 72→    fun onCreate() {
 73→        dispatcher.register(createSiteUseCase)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    fun onDestroy() {
 77→        dispatcher.unregister(createSiteUseCase)
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    private fun executePhase(phase: SiteCreationStep) {
 81→        when (phase) {
 82→            IDLE -> updateServiceState(IDLE)
 83→            CREATE_SITE -> {
 84→                updateServiceState(CREATE_SITE)
 85→                createSite()
 86→            }
 87→            SUCCESS -> {
 88→                updateServiceState(SUCCESS, Pair(newSiteRemoteId, newSiteUrl))
 89→                // This stat is part of a funnel that provides critical information.  Before
 90→                // making ANY modification to this stat please refer to: p4qSXL-35X-p2
 91→                tracker.trackSiteCreated(siteData.siteDesign)
 92→            }
 93→            FAILURE -> {
 94→                val currentState = serviceListener.getCurrentState()
 95→                AppLog.e(
 96→                    T.SITE_CREATION,
 97→                    "SiteCreationService entered state FAILURE while on step: ${currentState?.step?.name}"
 98→                )
 99→                updateServiceState(FAILURE, currentState)
100→            }
101→        }
102→    }
103→
104→    private fun createSite() {
105→        launch {
106→            AppLog.i(
107→                T.SITE_CREATION,
108→                "Dispatching Create Site Action, SiteName: ${siteData.domain}, isFree: ${siteData.isFree}"
109→            )
110→            val createSiteEvent: OnNewSiteCreated
111→            try {
112→                createSiteEvent = createSiteUseCase.createSite(siteData, languageId, timeZoneId)
113→            } catch (e: IllegalStateException) {
114→                AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, e.message ?: "Unexpected error.")
115→                executePhase(FAILURE)
116→                return@launch
117→            }
118→
119→            newSiteRemoteId = createSiteEvent.newSiteRemoteId
120→            newSiteUrl = createSiteEvent.url ?: ""
121→            AppLog.i(T.SITE_CREATION, createSiteEvent.toString())
122→            if (createSiteEvent.isError) {
123→                if (createSiteEvent.error.type == SiteStore.NewSiteErrorType.SITE_NAME_EXISTS) {
124→                    if (isRetry) {
125→                        // Move to the next step. The site was already created on the server by our previous attempt.
126→                        AppLog.w(
127→                            T.SITE_CREATION,
128→                            "WPCOM site already created but we are in retrying mode so, just move on."
129→                        )
130→                        executePhase(SUCCESS)
131→                    } else {
132→                        /**
133→                         * This state should not happen in production unless the domain suggestion endpoint is broken.
134→                         * There is a very low chance two users picked the same domain at the same time and only
135→                         * the first got it.
136→                         */
137→                        val errorMsg = "Site already exists - seems like an issue with domain suggestions endpoint"
138→                        AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, errorMsg)
139→                        throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
140→                    }
141→                } else {
142→                    executePhase(FAILURE)
143→                }
144→            } else {
145→                executePhase(SUCCESS)
146→            }
147→        }
148→    }
149→
150→    /**
151→     * Helper method to create a new State object and set it as the new state.
152→     *
153→     * @param step The step of the new state
154→     * @param payload The payload to attach to the new state
155→     */
156→    private fun updateServiceState(step: SiteCreationStep, payload: Any? = null) {
157→        serviceListener.updateState(SiteCreationServiceState(step, payload))
158→    }
159→
160→    interface SiteCreationServiceManagerListener {
161→        fun getCurrentState(): SiteCreationServiceState?
162→
163→        fun updateState(state: SiteCreationServiceState)
164→    }
165→}

 9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.OnNewSiteCreated
10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SiteVisibility
11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SiteVisibility.PUBLIC
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceData
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
14→import javax.inject.Inject
15→import kotlin.coroutines.Continuation
16→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
17→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
18→
19→/**
20→ * Transforms OnNewSiteCreated EventBus event to a coroutine.
21→ */
22→class CreateSiteUseCase @Inject constructor(
23→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
24→    @Suppress("unused") private val siteStore: SiteStore,
25→    private val urlUtilsWrapper: UrlUtilsWrapper
26→) {
27→    private var continuation: Continuation<OnNewSiteCreated>? = null
28→
29→    @Suppress("UseCheckOrError")
30→    suspend fun createSite(
31→        siteData: SiteCreationServiceData,
32→        languageWordPressId: String,
33→        timeZoneId: String,
34→        siteVisibility: SiteVisibility = PUBLIC,
35→        dryRun: Boolean = false
36→    ): OnNewSiteCreated {
37→        if (continuation != null) {
38→            throw IllegalStateException("Create site request has already been sent.")
39→        }
40→        /*
41→         * To create a site with WordPress.com sub-domain, we need to pass the domain name without the "wordpress.com"
42→         * whereas to create a site with other domains, we need to pass the full url. This issue is addressed
43→         * in this use case since it's closest to the network layer.
44→         *
45→         * Ideally API wouldn't work like this or if it does FluxC is the one that handles the issue. However, at the
46→         * time of this comment, changing FluxC's Payload might end up affecting the old site creation flow,
47→         * so the workaround is applied here instead.
48→         */
49→        val domain = when {
50→            siteData.domain.isNullOrEmpty() -> null
51→            isWordPressComSubDomain(siteData.domain) -> urlUtilsWrapper.extractSubDomain(siteData.domain)
52→            else -> siteData.domain
53→        }
54→        return suspendCoroutine { cont ->
55→            val newSitePayload = NewSitePayload(
56→                domain,
57→                siteData.title,
58→                languageWordPressId,
59→                timeZoneId,
60→                siteVisibility,
61→                siteData.segmentId,
62→                siteData.siteDesign,
63→                dryRun,
64→                findAvailableUrl = if (siteData.isFree) null else true
65→            )
66→            continuation = cont
67→            dispatcher.dispatch(SiteActionBuilder.newCreateNewSiteAction(newSitePayload))
68→        }
69→    }
70→
71→    @Suppress("unused")
72→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
73→    fun onNewSiteCreated(event: OnNewSiteCreated) {
74→        continuation?.resume(event)
75→        continuation = null
76→    }
77→}
78→
79→fun isWordPressComSubDomain(url: String) = url.endsWith(".wordpress.com")
80→

Summary:
- Updated `SiteCreationServiceManager` to stop throwing `IllegalStateException` when a site name conflict occurs, log the issue, and emit a controlled failure state without resume payload via a new `updateFailureState` helper. This prevents crashes while still allowing other failures to resume as before.
- Made `SiteCreationProgressViewModel` tolerate failure events that lack resume data so retries can restart the flow cleanly.
- Added supporting fixtures plus unit tests covering the new failure handling in both the service manager and the progress view model.

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  5→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
  7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.OnNewSiteCreated
 10→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.CREATE_SITE
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.FAILURE
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.IDLE
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.SUCCESS
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.CreateSiteUseCase
 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 20→import javax.inject.Inject
 21→import javax.inject.Named
 22→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 23→import kotlin.properties.Delegates
 24→
 25→class SiteCreationServiceManager @Inject constructor(
 26→    private val createSiteUseCase: CreateSiteUseCase,
 27→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 28→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 29→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 30→) : CoroutineScope {
 31→    private val job = Job()
 32→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 33→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 34→
 35→    private lateinit var siteData: SiteCreationServiceData
 36→    private lateinit var languageId: String
 37→    private lateinit var timeZoneId: String
 38→    private lateinit var serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 39→    private var isRetry by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 40→    private var newSiteRemoteId by Delegates.notNull<Long>()
 41→    private var newSiteUrl by Delegates.notNull<String>()
 42→
 43→    fun onStart(
 44→        languageWordPressId: String,
 45→        timeZoneId: String,
 46→        previousState: String?,
 47→        data: SiteCreationServiceData,
 48→        serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 49→    ) {
 50→        languageId = languageWordPressId
 51→        this.timeZoneId = timeZoneId
 52→        siteData = data
 53→        this.serviceListener = serviceListener
 54→
 55→        executePhase(IDLE)
 56→
 57→        isRetry = previousState != null
 58→
 59→        val phaseToExecute = if (isRetry) {
 60→            SiteCreationStep.valueOf(previousState!!)
 61→        } else {
 62→            CREATE_SITE
 63→        }
 64→
 65→        if (SiteCreationServiceState(phaseToExecute).isTerminal) {
 66→            AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, "IllegalState: SiteCreationService can't resume a terminal step!")
 67→        } else {
 68→            executePhase(phaseToExecute)
 69→        }
 70→    }
 71→
 72→    fun onCreate() {
 73→        dispatcher.register(createSiteUseCase)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    fun onDestroy() {
 77→        dispatcher.unregister(createSiteUseCase)
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    private fun executePhase(phase: SiteCreationStep) {
 81→        when (phase) {
 82→            IDLE -> updateServiceState(IDLE)
 83→            CREATE_SITE -> {
 84→                updateServiceState(CREATE_SITE)
 85→                createSite()
 86→            }
 87→            SUCCESS -> {
 88→                updateServiceState(SUCCESS, Pair(newSiteRemoteId, newSiteUrl))
 89→                // This stat is part of a funnel that provides critical information.  Before
 90→                // making ANY modification to this stat please refer to: p4qSXL-35X-p2
 91→                tracker.trackSiteCreated(siteData.siteDesign)
 92→            }
 93→            FAILURE -> {
 94→                val currentState = serviceListener.getCurrentState()
 95→                AppLog.e(
 96→                    T.SITE_CREATION,
 97→                    "SiteCreationService entered state FAILURE while on step: ${currentState?.step?.name}"
 98→                )
 99→                updateServiceState(FAILURE, currentState)
100→            }
101→        }
102→    }
103→
104→    private fun createSite() {
105→        launch {
106→            AppLog.i(
107→                T.SITE_CREATION,
108→                "Dispatching Create Site Action, SiteName: ${siteData.domain}, isFree: ${siteData.isFree}"
109→            )
110→            val createSiteEvent: OnNewSiteCreated
111→            try {
112→                createSiteEvent = createSiteUseCase.createSite(siteData, languageId, timeZoneId)
113→            } catch (e: IllegalStateException) {
114→                AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, e.message ?: "Unexpected error.")
115→                executePhase(FAILURE)
116→                return@launch
117→            }
118→
119→            newSiteRemoteId = createSiteEvent.newSiteRemoteId
120→            newSiteUrl = createSiteEvent.url ?: ""
121→            AppLog.i(T.SITE_CREATION, createSiteEvent.toString())
122→            if (createSiteEvent.isError) {
123→                if (createSiteEvent.error.type == SiteStore.NewSiteErrorType.SITE_NAME_EXISTS) {
124→                    if (isRetry) {
125→                        // Move to the next step. The site was already created on the server by our previous attempt.
126→                        AppLog.w(
127→                            T.SITE_CREATION,
128→                            "WPCOM site already created but we are in retrying mode so, just move on."
129→                        )
130→                        executePhase(SUCCESS)
131→                    } else {
132→                        /**
133→                         * This state should not happen in production unless the domain suggestion endpoint is broken.
134→                         * There is a very low chance two users picked the same domain at the same time and only
135→                         * the first got it.
136→                         */
137→                        val errorMsg = "Site already exists - seems like an issue with domain suggestions endpoint"
138→                        AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, errorMsg)
139→                        throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
140→                    }
141→                } else {
142→                    executePhase(FAILURE)
143→                }
144→            } else {
145→                executePhase(SUCCESS)
146→            }
147→        }
148→    }
149→
150→    /**
151→     * Helper method to create a new State object and set it as the new state.
152→     *
153→     * @param step The step of the new state
154→     * @param payload The payload to attach to the new state
155→     */
156→    private fun updateServiceState(step: SiteCreationStep, payload: Any? = null) {
157→        serviceListener.updateState(SiteCreationServiceState(step, payload))
158→    }
159→
160→    interface SiteCreationServiceManagerListener {
161→        fun getCurrentState(): SiteCreationServiceState?
162→
163→        fun updateState(state: SiteCreationServiceState)
164→    }
165→}

19→/**
20→ * Transforms OnNewSiteCreated EventBus event to a coroutine.
21→ */
22→class CreateSiteUseCase @Inject constructor(
23→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
24→    @Suppress("unused") private val siteStore: SiteStore,
25→    private val urlUtilsWrapper: UrlUtilsWrapper
26→) {
27→    private var continuation: Continuation<OnNewSiteCreated>? = null
28→
29→    @Suppress("UseCheckOrError")
30→    suspend fun createSite(
31→        siteData: SiteCreationServiceData,
32→        languageWordPressId: String,
33→        timeZoneId: String,
34→        siteVisibility: SiteVisibility = PUBLIC,
35→        dryRun: Boolean = false
36→    ): OnNewSiteCreated {
37→        if (continuation != null) {
38→            throw IllegalStateException("Create site request has already been sent.")
39→        }
40→        /*
41→         * To create a site with WordPress.com sub-domain, we need to pass the domain name without the "wordpress.com"
42→         * whereas to create a site with other domains, we need to pass the full url. This issue is addressed
43→         * in this use case since it's closest to the network layer.
44→         *
45→         * Ideally API wouldn't work like this or if it does FluxC is the one that handles the issue. However, at the
46→         * time of this comment, changing FluxC's Payload might end up affecting the old site creation flow,
47→         * so the workaround is applied here instead.
48→         */
49→        val domain = when {
50→            siteData.domain.isNullOrEmpty() -> null
51→            isWordPressComSubDomain(siteData.domain) -> urlUtilsWrapper.extractSubDomain(siteData.domain)
52→            else -> siteData.domain
53→        }
54→        return suspendCoroutine { cont ->
55→            val newSitePayload = NewSitePayload(
56→                domain,
57→                siteData.title,
58→                languageWordPressId,
59→                timeZoneId,
60→                siteVisibility,
61→                siteData.segmentId,
62→                siteData.siteDesign,
63→                dryRun,
64→                findAvailableUrl = if (siteData.isFree) null else true
65→            )
66→            continuation = cont
67→            dispatcher.dispatch(SiteActionBuilder.newCreateNewSiteAction(newSitePayload))
68→        }
69→    }
70→
71→    @Suppress("unused")
72→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
73→    fun onNewSiteCreated(event: OnNewSiteCreated) {
74→        continuation?.resume(event)
75→        continuation = null
76→    }
77→}
78→
79→fun isWordPressComSubDomain(url: String) = url.endsWith(".wordpress.com")
